tasks.description: JSON plan task spec에 선택적 cost_limit_usd 숫자 필드를 지원하라. `_task_from_spec`은 숫자 `cost_limit_usd` 값을 `Task.cost_limit_usd`로 보존해야 한다. 음수 `cost_limit_usd`는 기존 `Task` 검증을 통해 `ValueError`로 거부해야 한다. `cost_limit_usd`를 포함한 유효한 plan JSON은 `_validate_plan_file`을 통과해야 한다. `_load_plan`은 plan JSON의 `cost_limit_usd` 값을 보존해야 한다. plan-generation task description에는 literal field name `cost_limit_usd`가 포함되어야 한다. 기존 필드와 CLI 동작은 호환되어야 한다.
tasks.objective: plan JSON의 cost_limit_usd가 생성·검증·loading 경로에서 손실 없이 동작하고 음수 제한이 거부된다.
constraints: 격리 checkout 밖의 파일을 읽거나 수정하지 않는다.
기존 plan schema와 unit test를 깨뜨리지 않는다.

assertion_contracts.evaluator_requirement: _task_from_spec returns a Task whose cost_limit_usd equals the supplied numeric value.
A negative cost_limit_usd raises ValueError through Task validation.
assertion_contracts.task_contract_text: 음수 `cost_limit_usd`는 기존 `Task` 검증을 통해 `ValueError`로 거부해야 한다.

assertion_contracts.evaluator_requirement: _validate_plan_file accepts a valid plan containing cost_limit_usd.
assertion_contracts.task_contract_text: `cost_limit_usd`를 포함한 유효한 plan JSON은 `_validate_plan_file`을 통과해야 한다.

assertion_contracts.evaluator_requirement: _load_plan preserves the cost_limit_usd value from plan JSON.
The plan-generation task description contains the literal cost_limit_usd field name.
assertion_contracts.task_contract_text: plan-generation task description에는 literal field name `cost_limit_usd`가 포함되어야 한다.

tasks.description: Extend the replay CLI JSON report with finalized_attempt_count and attempt_status_counts. An ordinary replay CLI invocation over a valid event log must exit with code 0. For the declared two-attempt fixture, top-level attempt_count must equal 2, finalized_attempt_count must equal 1, and incomplete_attempt_count must equal 1. Top-level attempt_status_counts must equal exactly {"finalized": 1, "started": 1}. Derive all counts from replayed RoutingState without mutating or reconciling the event log.
tasks.objective: Replay reports total, finalized, incomplete, and per-status attempt counts consistently from one immutable state projection.
constraints: Do not change lifecycle event rows during ordinary replay.
Do not access the network or files outside the isolated checkout.
Preserve existing replay output fields and tests.

assertion_contracts.evaluator_requirement: The replay CLI invocation exits with code 0.
assertion_contracts.task_contract_text: An ordinary replay CLI invocation over a valid event log must exit with code 0.

assertion_contracts.evaluator_requirement: The fixture report has attempt_count equal to 2.
The fixture report has finalized_attempt_count equal to 1.
The fixture report has incomplete_attempt_count equal to 1.
The fixture report has exact finalized and started status counts with no extra keys.

tasks.description: `paired plan MANIFEST --workspace-root ROOT` command를 추가하라. manifest schema만 읽고 JSON을 반환해야 한다. 두 번의 `paired plan` 호출은 각각 exit code 0을 반환해야 한다. 두 호출의 parsed JSON data는 동일해야 한다. Top-level `agent_execution_started` must be boolean false. Top-level `workspace_creation_started` must be boolean false. Top-level `assignments` must contain exactly 4 entries. Top-level `workspaces` must contain exactly 8 entries. The 8 `workspaces[*].path` values must be unique. `ROOT` must not exist after either invocation.
tasks.objective: paired workspace layout과 identity를 명시된 JSON contract로 filesystem mutation 없이 사전 검토할 수 있다.
constraints: plan command는 source repository나 evaluator artifact의 현재 상태를 검사하지 않는다.
ROOT를 포함한 어떤 경로도 만들거나 덮어쓰지 않는다.
기존 validate, dry-run, analyze command를 유지한다.

assertion_contracts.evaluator_requirement: Each of two paired plan invocations exits with code 0.
assertion_contracts.task_contract_text: 두 번의 `paired plan` 호출은 각각 exit code 0을 반환해야 한다.

assertion_contracts.evaluator_requirement: The parsed JSON data from both invocations is equal.
assertion_contracts.task_contract_text: 두 호출의 parsed JSON data는 동일해야 한다.

assertion_contracts.evaluator_requirement: Top-level agent_execution_started is boolean false.
Top-level workspace_creation_started is boolean false.
Top-level assignments contains exactly four entries.
Top-level workspaces contains exactly eight entries.
All eight workspaces path values are unique.
The requested workspace root does not exist after either invocation.
assertion_contracts.task_contract_text: `ROOT` must not exist after either invocation.

tasks.description: paired analysis의 overall 및 모든 stratum summary에 evaluator_coverage를 추가하라. 값은 binary_observed_pair_count / pair_count이며 pair가 없을 때만 null이어야 한다. One-sided/incomplete fixture에서 overall `pair_count`는 4여야 한다. Overall `binary_observed_pair_count`는 1이어야 한다. Overall `quality_missing_pair_count`는 3이어야 한다. Overall `evaluator_coverage`는 0.25여야 한다. `evaluator_coverage`는 항상 0.0 이상 1.0 이하여야 한다. one-sided failure와 incomplete pair를 분모에서 제거하지 말고 기존 2x2, missing count, promotion blocker semantics를 유지하라.
tasks.objective: objective evaluator 결측이 0으로 대체되지 않고 0..1 coverage로 명시적으로 보고된다.
constraints: 결측 quality를 pass 또는 fail로 대체하지 않는다.
기존 paired risk difference와 2x2 집계를 변경하지 않는다.
격리 checkout 밖을 읽거나 수정하지 않고 네트워크를 사용하지 않는다.

assertion_contracts.evaluator_requirement: The overall summary retains all four preregistered pairs.
The fixture has exactly one pair with binary quality observed for both agents.
The fixture retains three pairs with missing paired quality.
The overall evaluator coverage equals one observed binary pair divided by four preregistered pairs.
Evaluator coverage is bounded between zero and one inclusive.

stopping_rules: Stop immediately on secret, production, network, push, or unexpected external access.
Stop immediately if any prepared checkout commit, tree, or fixture hash differs.
Stop immediately if evaluator artifact version/hash differs before or after evaluation.
Stop when the declared wall-time or execution-count budget is exhausted.
pause_rules: Pause after any permission or sandbox failure until both agents have an equal corrected environment.
Pause after a one-sided infrastructure failure; retain the row and classify it before resuming.
Pause if lifecycle propensity or deterministic pair/order identity is missing.
exclusion_rules: Exclude only a task whose base fixture is broken before both agent executions.
Do not exclude agent failure, timeout, interruption, one-sided failure, or missing quality caused after execution starts.
Publish every excluded task ID and the preregistered exclusion reason.
